args.query:
WITH opp AS (
  SELECT 
    REPLACE(TRIM(OwnerId), '#','') AS owner_id,
    REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c), '#','') AS contract_id,
    CAST(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_ts
  FROM Opportunity o
  WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
), ctr AS (
  SELECT 
    REPLACE(TRIM(Id), '#','') AS contract_id,
    CAST(CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) AS company_signed_ts
  FROM Contract
  WHERE CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  opp.owner_id AS agent_id,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', opp.created_ts, ctr.company_signed_ts)) AS avg_turnaround_days
FROM opp
JOIN ctr ON opp.contract_id = ctr.contract_id
WHERE ctr.company_signed_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND opp.created_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND ctr.company_signed_ts >= opp.created_ts
GROUP BY opp.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH opp AS (
  SELECT 
    REPLACE(TRIM(OwnerId), '#','') AS owner_id,
    REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c), '#','') AS contract_id,
    CAST(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_ts
  FROM Opportunity o
  WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
), ctr AS (
  SELECT 
    REPLACE(TRIM(Id), '#','') AS contract_id,
    CAST(CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP) AS company_signed_ts
  FROM Contract
  WHERE CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  opp.owner_id AS agent_id,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', opp.created_ts, ctr.company_signed_ts)) AS avg_turnaround_days
FROM opp
JOIN ctr ON opp.contract_id = ctr.contract_id
WHERE ctr.company_signed_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND opp.created_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND ctr.company_signed_ts >= opp.created_ts
GROUP BY opp.owner_id
ORDER BY avg_turnaround_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
